events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: 83 years young and still moving like Jagger! Happy Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary Irony
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony isn't lost on us, radio is still going strong! What was your favourite MTV memory?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' released 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, becoming a cornerstone of Britpop.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. Which track still gives you that supersonic feeling?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. What's your favourite performance from the iconic festival?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death (49 years)
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Tribute to The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years since we lost the King. His music and legacy live on. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' released 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album Cover
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road' and that unforgettable album cover. Still inspiring walks across zebra crossings worldwide!

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and fierce style continue to inspire. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the swagger and the tunes. What's your favourite track he's fronted?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music with '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Music Revolution
angles.copy: Remember when the first iPod dropped 25 years ago? It changed how we listened to music forever. What was the first song you loaded on yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic themes to unforgettable gadgets, which Bond film or song is your ultimate favourite?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon Tribute
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're celebrating the enduring legacy of John Lennon. His message of peace still resonates. What's your favourite John Lennon song?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary comedian and actor, John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, what's your favourite Cleese moment?
